source.definition: a person who applies paint to walls, ceilings, or other surfaces

explanation.sourceText: The English word “painter” comes from the verb “paint,” which derives from the Old French “peintier,” itself from the Latin “pingere,” meaning “to paint.”
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „painter” provine din verbul „paint”, care derivă din vechiul francez „peintier”, la rândul său din latină „pingere”, care înseamnă „a picta”.

source.additional: A painter is an artist who decorates walls, furniture, or canvases with colors.

target.definition: o persoană care aplică vopsea pe pereți, plafon sau alte suprafețe

explanation.sourceText: „Pictor“ comes from the Latin word „pictor“, meaning „painter“, derived from „pingere“ (to paint).
explanation.targetText: „Pictor“ provine din latină, din „pictor“, care înseamnă „pictor“, derivat din „pingere“ („a picta“).

target.additional: Un „pictor“ poate folosi diverse tehnici de pictură, cum ar fi culorile în ulei sau acuarela.

examples.sourceText: The painter finished the picture in a few hours.
examples.targetText: Pictorul a terminat tabloul în câteva ore.

examples.sourceText: Every painter has their own style.
examples.targetText: Fiecare pictor are propriul său stil.

examples.sourceText: A famous painter will have an exhibition.
examples.targetText: Un pictor celebru va avea o expoziție.

examples.sourceText: The mural painter decorates the school.
The painter finished the picture in a few hours.
examples.targetText: Pictorul a terminat tabloul în câteva ore.

examples.sourceText: Every painter has their own style.
examples.targetText: Fiecare pictor are propriul său stil.

examples.sourceText: He works as a painter in a large company.
examples.targetText: El lucrează ca pictor într-o companie mare.

examples.sourceText: The painter uses many different colors.
Painters and artists are often very creative.
examples.targetText: Pictorii și artiștii sunt adesea foarte creativi.

examples.sourceText: A famous painter will have an exhibition.
examples.targetText: Un pictor celebru va avea o expoziție.

learningTips.text: Remember 'pictor' by linking it to 'picture'—a painter creates pictures, making it easier to recall.
Think of a painter as someone who 'paints' the world colorful, just like the English word 'paint'.
The Romanian word 'pictor' sounds like 'picture' with an 'or' ending, helping you remember it means painter.
Connect 'pictor' with famous painters like Picasso to remember it relates to artistic painting.
